pattern: Greedy: sort descending, pick the top k values each reduced by the number of picks already made (floored at zero).
hints: Picking a child in the i-th turn (0-indexed) means all previously unpicked children have already lost i points; the selected child's effective happiness is max(0, h - i).
To maximize total happiness, always pick the highest remaining happiness value each turn — sort descending and pick the top k.
Sum max(0, happiness[i] - i) for i in 0..k-1 over the sorted-descending array.

edge_inputs.description: happiness drops to zero before k picks
effective happiness bottoms at 0 not negative
k equals n, all children selected

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = size
    happiness = [rng.randint(1, 10**8) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(1, n)
    return [happiness, k]
